headline: Has The Strong Share Price Run Left Jabil (JBL) Trading Close To Its Estimated Value
summary: If you are wondering whether Jabil's current share price still offers value after a strong run, you are not alone. The stock last closed at US$264.15, with a 1 year return of 89.8% and a year to date return of 9.9%. The 7 day and 30 day returns of 0.4% and 0.8% hint at a pause after very large 3 year and 5 year gains of 206.7% and 407.4%. Recent coverage has focused on Jabil as an established player in electronics manufacturing and supply chain services, with attention on how it fits into...

headline: PLXS Stock Up 32% in 3 Months: Is There Further Upside Left?
summary: Plexus surges 32% in 3 months, driven by strong program wins and a $3.6 billion pipeline, but can growth momentum outweigh industrial weakness and competition?
